title: Install basic ancillary electrical systems and components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Install basic ancillary electrical systems and components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to install basic ancillary electrical system and components

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications and installation fitting instructions are sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are considered and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications and installation fitting instructions are sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are considered and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined according to workplace instructions1.2 Manufacturer specifications and installation fitting instructions are sourced and interpreted1.3 Installation options are considered and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.5 Tools, equipment and materials are selected and checked for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to install basic ancillary electrical system and components

elements.title: Install and test basic ancillary electrical system and components

pcs.text: Electrical system and components are checked for correct application and damage2.2 Electrical equipment is installed according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed system and components are tested for correct operation according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications2.4 Post-installation testing of other electrical systems is carried out according to workplace procedures to confirm correct operation, and any problems detected as having been introduced during the installation process are rectified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Electrical system and components are checked for correct application and damage2.2 Electrical equipment is installed according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed system and components are tested for correct operation according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications2.4 Post-installation testing of other electrical systems is carried out according to workplace procedures to confirm correct operation, and any problems detected as having been introduced during the installation process are rectified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Electrical system and components are checked for correct application and damage2.2 Electrical equipment is installed according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.3 Installed system and components are tested for correct operation according to workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications2.4 Post-installation testing of other electrical systems is carried out according to workplace procedures to confirm correct operation, and any problems detected as having been introduced during the installation process are rectified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Install and test basic ancillary electrical system and components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work is to workplace expectations and vehicle or machinery is presented ready for use3.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected3.3 Tools and equipment are checked and stored and any faulty electrical equipment is identified, tagged and isolated according to workplace procedures3.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
